question.label: Next two weeks steadier
question.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
question.description: Ends by converting the conversation into a concrete ask or adjustment without opening a new thread.

answer: I want to focus first on unblocking the one dependency that is slowing the team the most this week.

assessment.note: Names a concrete near-term focus and priority, which signals some steadiness through clearer immediate direction.

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want to focus first on unblocking the one dependency that is slowing the team the most this week.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.

Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
